aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content. The business lacks visibility in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with conversational content

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating and positive reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency plumbing and HVAC services in Southeastern Wisconsin
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the go-to expert through detailed service explanations and customer testimonials

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: No schema markup or FAQ content detected on the website.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data and conversational content to improve AI visibility and drive more qualified leads.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3 months
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share.
